name: @commander/adapter-ops
description: Adapter-ops deploy unit: EffectBroker-backed compensation/reconcile drain (not a V2 plane; kernel-ops owns reclaim/timer/outbox)

scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @commander/contracts build && pnpm --filter @commander/effect-broker build && pnpm --filter @commander/kernel build && pnpm --filter @commander/action-adapters build
scripts.test: tsx --test src/compensationDaemon.test.ts src/reconciliationDaemon.test.ts src/healthServer.test.ts src/run.test.ts src/chaos/timeoutAfterCommit.test.ts src/chaos/workerKillRestart.test.ts
